aas.name: Blood Rune
aas.description: Melee and ability critical hits give you 5% of the damage done as an absorption shield, up to 5% of your max hitpoints. Requirements: level 1.

aas.name: Innate Power Strike
aas.description: Grants the Berserker an increased chance to critically strike. Requirements: level 1.

aas.name: Tireless Spirit
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 372 - Refresh Time: 0:25:00 - Ability Timer(s): 3. This ability, when activated, increases your movement speed by 125% for 18 seconds. Requirements: level 10.

aas.name: Unbound Fury
aas.description: This passive ability increases your chance to land a critical hit with your melee attacks and abilites by 2%. Requirements: level 12. }
